title: Run command missing -benchmem flag — alloc information will be absent
benchmark_snippet:
# User provides this run command:
$ go test -bench=BenchmarkEncode -count=10 ./...
# Missing -benchmem flag
expected_feedback: add -benchmem to the run command: go test -bench=BenchmarkEncode -benchmem -count=10 ./...; without it allocs/op and B/op columns are missing
